description: No direct benchmark studies available. Benchmark derived from alternative therapy studies. Must have acceptability rationale, alternatives rejected rationale, and explicit limitations.

alternative_benchmarks_rejected.reason: Angio-Seal registry data excluded — different anatomical site (femoral, not peripheral)
In vitro study excluded — no clinical endpoint data

endpoints.acceptability_rationale: Manual compression is the clinical alternative to closure devices for peripheral vasculature. The study population partially overlaps with the target population.
endpoints.alternatives_rejected_rationale: Angio-Seal registry excluded due to different anatomical site. In vitro study excluded due to lack of clinical endpoints.
